title: Ensure L2 dispatch byte (0x15) stripping before Announce::from_bytes and SCHC rule updates for CCP-9 announce payloads
close_reason: Implemented L2 dispatch (0x15) stripping in Announce::from_bytes for CCP-9 compatibility; updated parsing to handle both wrapped and unwrapped payloads matching test vectors and spec. Tests aligned, no subbeads created.
